This listing is for 1 hanger. Please drop us a message if you have any questions.
description: Product Description Wedding hangers for your special occasion, these hangers make elegant gifts that your loved ones can cherish forever. Beautiful hangers perfect as gifts to your bridal party, family or friends. They are great as keepsakes for you and your loved ones. Made from solid wood, these hangers are strong and suitable for all types of clothing. They are laser engraved with precision and accuracy so the message lasts forever without fear of rubbing off. FAST DELIVERY: Simply click the Order button and get it within a few days, ready for your perfect day! Material: Solid Wood. Hook: Steel, Galvanized. Dimensions - Adults Width: 44cm, Height: 21.5cm, Thickness: 1.4cm Customisation - Your product will be engraved in the style and font as seen in the images. Choking hazard - Some products contains small parts - not suitable or intended for young children or babies. Variations - Please note that due to the natural quality of wood, grain and colour may vary between each product and may differ slightly from that of the product image. Our aim is to provide you with the best engraved products, however we use laser engravers therefore small burn marks may appear. Please allow 0.5-1cm differences due to manual measurement.
